examples: He is spoiled, arrogant and has a tendency toward snobbery.
There has often been an element of snobbery in golf.
Isabelle is quick to refute any suggestion of intellectual snobbery.
But music snobbery is exhausting and more than a bit junior year of high school.
There has long been snobbery about winemakers who don't own (all of) their own vineyards.
